questions.assertion: Assertion (A): HIV infection can cause AIDS
questions.reason: Reason (R): HIV targets and destroys CD4+ T lymphocytes, leading to a weakened immune system
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: HIV infection directly leads to AIDS by destroying CD4+ T lymphocytes, which are crucial for the immune system.
